SessionStart.command: echo '## Environment' && node -v && echo '## Git' && git branch --show-current && git status -s | head -20 && echo '## Docker' && docker compose ps --format 'table {{.Name}}	{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo 'Docker not running'

hooks.command: TOOL_INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" && if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+push\s+--force|drop\s+table|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Use safer alternatives.' && exit 2; fi && exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+') && case "$FILE" in */js/*.js) npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; */css/*.css) npx stylelint "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; */server/src/*.ts) cd server && npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "${FILE#*/server/}" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; *) ;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+') && case "$FILE" in */js/*.js) npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; */css/*.css) npx stylelint "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; */server/src/*.ts) cd server && npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "${FILE#*/server/}" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; *) ;; esac
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'npm run test|npx vitest'; then echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | bash .claude/scripts/filter-test-output.sh; fi
